title: Forecastable Metric
description: Standard delivery and engagement metric names for forecasts. For outcome/conversion forecasts (purchases, leads, app installs, etc.), use event-type enum values as metric keys instead. The ForecastPoint metrics map accepts any string key, so both forecastable-metric and event-type values can be used together.

enumDescriptions.reach: Estimated unique reach. The reach_unit field on DeliveryForecast specifies the measurement unit (individuals, households, devices, etc.).
enumDescriptions.impressions: Estimated ad-server or first-party delivery count. When measured_impressions is also present, impressions represents the seller's own delivery count while measured_impressions represents the third-party currency count — both may appear on the same forecast point as complementary layers.
enumDescriptions.spend: Estimated spend in the forecast currency
enumDescriptions.completed_views: Estimated video/audio completions. Threshold depends on view_duration_seconds if set on the optimization goal.
enumDescriptions.grps: Estimated Gross Rating Points (for CPP). When present, the demographic_system and demographic fields on DeliveryForecast should specify the target demographic.
enumDescriptions.engagements: Estimated engagements (social reactions, comments, shares, story opens, overlay taps, etc.)
enumDescriptions.follows: Estimated new followers, page likes, or channel subscribes
enumDescriptions.saves: Estimated saves, bookmarks, playlist adds, or pins
enumDescriptions.profile_visits: Estimated visits to the brand's in-platform page or profile
enumDescriptions.measured_impressions: Impressions as counted by the third-party measurement provider specified in measurement_source on DeliveryForecast. Complementary to impressions — both may appear on the same forecast point. impressions is the ad-server delivery count; measured_impressions is the third-party currency count. Present when measurement_source is set. Use with method 'guaranteed' for contractually committed delivery, or with method 'modeled' for third-party-measured estimates without a guarantee.
enumDescriptions.downloads: Estimated downloads. Primary currency for podcast advertising per IAB Podcast Measurement guidelines.
enumDescriptions.plays: Number of times the ad creative is displayed on a DOOH screen or played in a loop. Raw play count before any impression multiplier is applied. Use alongside impressions or measured_impressions when buyers need both the play count and the multiplied audience figure.
